---
title: "Example"
author: "Inayat Gill"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Introduction

This is a simple quarto document demonstrating HTML output.

```{r}

# A basic R computation

library(palmerpenguins)
summary(penguins)

```

## Analysis

This section was added on main. It provides summary table instead of mean calculation.

```{r}

summary(penguins$body_mass)

```
